description: A sales representative needs to enter a new order for an existing customer for 10 drums of a standard product.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer account and their default shipping location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly pulls up the customer's master data.

nodes.task_description: Check inventory levels for the requested product to ensure availability.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms there are sufficient drums in stock to fulfill the order.

nodes.task_description: Create a new sales order, applying the customer's contract pricing, and submit it for fulfillment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the sales order, which is now visible to the logistics team.
